runners.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (25.64) over 450m at this track. Has a low draw. Solid top-three prospects.

runners.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and scored again last start over 450m at this track (25.49,) beating Kaelix Storm. Can measure up again with the right run.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Horsham over 410m in 23.07. Followed that up with a minor placing over 450m at this track at Grade 5 H a week ago. This looks too tough.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 H on April 9 over 450m at this track behind Fear The Beer beaten 6 lengths (25.76). The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

runners.formComment: Impressive performance tracking the speed and going on to score by 3 lengths in a Mix 3/4 last start at Horsham, clocking a hot 22.99 for the 410m trip. In form and worth thought again.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.5 lengths fourth (25.66) over 450m at this track. More than capable and well placed to find his best form.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split and led until late but gathered in when a 2.75 lengths fifth at this track over 450m in 25.67. Will be tested in this company.
